boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain supplies all four required gates: pre-change callback source (CALL-QUA-071), vendor-master approval (VM-QUA-071), bank ownership validation (BANK-QUA-071), and payment-release authority (REL-QUA-071). All gates close on exact match of vendor name, account ending 8821, amount 73400, and release date 2026-06-28 before payment execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Pre-change callback source CALL-QUA-071 confirms account ending 8821; policy gate requires this exact term for bank-update closure.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly confirms account 8821 using the pre-change vendor master phone source. The pre-change term appears verbatim in source record. Account 8821 appears in PAY-QUA-071, VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071. All four gates close before execution date 2026-06-28.

critical_features_preserved: Account 8821 spelled out in full across chain
final_answer: Payment may proceed. CALL-QUA-071 explicitly confirms account ending 8821 using the pre-change vendor master phone source, satisfying Gate 1. VM-QUA-071 approves account 8821, BANK-QUA-071 validates ownership, and REL-QUA-071 authorizes release of USD 73400 to Quanta Field Services on 2026-06-28 before payment. The four policy gates close on exact chain evidence. ALLOW with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED.
